# Generated Workflow Inventory

This file is generated from bundled `workflows/*.workflow.json` files.

Bundled workflows: **4**

| ID | Name | Description | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `approval-loop` | Approval Loop | Draft work, branch on approval, and either publish or revise. | `workflows/approval-loop.workflow.json` |
| `content-pipeline` | Content Pipeline | Capture a brief, generate a draft, and produce a publication review handoff. | `workflows/content-pipeline.workflow.json` |
| `daily-operator-brief` | Daily Operator Brief | Generate a daily operating summary across publishing, approvals, and system health. | `workflows/daily-operator-brief.workflow.json` |
| `site-launch-readiness` | Site Launch Readiness | Run a lightweight launch checklist before publishing a companion site update. | `workflows/site-launch-readiness.workflow.json` |
